characters.name: Dylan Harris
characters.description: Dylan HarrisCharacter informationMarital statusSingleAffiliationJunior highBiographical informationPlace of birthMinoqua, WI[1]RelativesJoe Harris(Grandfather)Michael Harris(Father)Helen Harris(Mother)Bryce Harris(Older Brother)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight4'11"Eye colorHazelSeries informationAppearance(s)Dynoman and the VoltPortrayed byTyler CrumleyDylan Harrisis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. An awkward young boy with a love of comics but a feeling of powerlessness, Dylan's life becomes increasingly more exciting when he and hisgrandfatherreceive aringthat has the power to turn them into superheroes. Dylan is the youngest son of GastroenterologistMichael Harrisand phychiatristHelen Harris. He is the younger brother ofByrce Harris, with the boys being at least four years apart in age. Dylan has an affinity for comic books and everything comic related, becoming a connoisseur for the comic book world. Eight-year-old Dylan Harris uses power tools to work on a metal plate of armor. He wears a homemade Batman helmet and takes selfies in his superhero costume. In the mirror, he mimics Batman's signature catchphras. He attacks a punching bag then falls to the floor. He watches a car pull into the driveway as his grandfatherJoe, and Dylan's fatherMichaelexit.

characters.name: Elijah Whitaker
characters.description: Elijah WhitakerBiographical informationDate of birth2008(Age 12)RelativesSteve Whitaker(Father)Mary Ann Whitaker(Stepmother)Julie(Paternal Aunt)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The RiftPortrayed byDuncan JoinerElijah Whitakeris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. After witnessing a WWII plane crash, Elijah and hisstepmotherbefriend the time-travelingpilotinside. Elijah is the child of military pilot Steve, and the stepson ofMary Ann. His father died while fighting in Afghanistan, leaving Elijah in the custody of his stepmother. As they struggle to recover from the loss, Mary Ann makes plans to move to California.

characters.description: Elijah WhitakerBiographical informationDate of birth2008(Age 12)RelativesSteve Whitaker(Father)Mary Ann Whitaker(Stepmother)Julie(Paternal Aunt)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The RiftPortrayed byDuncan JoinerElijah Whitakeris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. characters.name: Evelyn Porter
characters.description: Evelyn PorterCharacter informationMarital statusUnknownAffiliationIowa FarmhouseSinging careerBiographical informationDate of birthCirca. 1894Place of birthIowaRelativesPaula Porter(Mother)Emmett Porter(Brother: deceased)Sam(Son)Warren(Grandfather)Physical descriptionGenderFemleHeight5'3"Eye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The CellarPortrayed byVictoria PedrettiEvelyn Porteris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. She is a betrothed socialite in 1919, whose life is changed forever by the arrival of atime traveler. Evelyn was born in Iowa in the late 1800s, to a mother namedPaula. She had a brother named Emmett who was an esteemed member of society, studying to become a doctor. Emmett tragically died and left the women penniless with theirIowa Farmhouseto care for. Because money was so tight, Paula made the decision to betroth Evelyn to the recent widower William. William was much older than Evelyn and already had two daughters. The relationship was not a love connection despite Evelyn's best attempts. The bank sent warning letters of the women's impending conviction, as the wedding date neared closer. In 2019, construction workerSam Taylorworks on a run-downIowa Farmhousewith his brother. He finds a photograph of a woman in a wedding dress, feeling an inexplicable connection to her. When in the basement during a derecho storm, he is crippled by high pitched ringing and vibrating. The barometer trembles. He falls to the ground. When he regains his balance, his surroundings are different. He runs upstairs to find the house in pristine old condition as if he's been transported to another time. He hears music playing coupled with beautiful singing. In one room is a woman, wearing 20th century garb, singing while playing the piano. The woman is the same one from the photograph - Evelyn Porter. She sees him in the reflection of a vase and whirls around. She warns him to stay back. He tries to explain who he is but she believes he's from the bank. He assures her that he isn't from the bank and won't hurt her, but he also doesn't know what is going on.

characters.name: Helen Harris
characters.description: Helen HarrisCharacter informationMarital statusMarried toMichael HarrisAffiliationPsychiatryBiographical informationRelativesBryce Harris(Son)Dylan Harris(Son)Joe Harris(Father-in-Law)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight5'6"Eye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)Dynoman and the VoltPortrayed byAlison BellHelen Harisis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. A psychatrist who is deeply protective over her husband, Helen worries the arrival of her father-in-law and typical curmudgeonJoe Harris, will disrupt her family's quiet life. Her instincts lead her to butt heads with Joe despite her best efforts to get along with him. Helen tells Joe that they've turned Dylan's room into his for now, with Dylan staying with Bryce upstairs. He scoffs that he can handle being unconscious for six hours, as it's the best part of his day. She offers to be there if he needs to talk as she's counseled a lot of patients going through aging or his process. She assures him that loss or grief is normal but he's firm that he's fine. The next day, Joe begins physical therapy with his new therapists. Michael and Helen discuss their work schedules, then ask Bryce to drive Dylan home after school. He agrees but only after practice which isn't over until 6:30. The bickering ensues before Joe intervenes. He promises to pick him up but needs the keys to do so. Michael is reluctant to let him drive but Joe is insistent he's fine as the injured leg is his left.

characters.name: Henry Barrett
characters.description: Henry BarrettCharacter informationMarital statusMarriedAffiliationFarmBiographical informationDate of birthCirca. 1800sPlace of birthIowaPhysical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The CellarPortrayed byCullen DouglasHenry Barrettis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. He is a farmer with a vast knowledge of weather and barometers. He becomes a mentor of sorts toSam Taylor.

characters.name: Jake Taylor
characters.description: Jake TaylorCharacter informationMarital statusMarried to RodgerAffiliationIowa FarmhouseSinging careerBiographical informationDate of birthCirca. 1990sPlace of birthIowaRelativesSam Taylor(Younger Brother)Alice Taylor(Adoptive Daughter)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The CellarPortrayed byMicah ScottJake Tayloris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. While restoring an oldIowa Farmhousein 2019, his brotherSamtravels through time.

characters.name: Joe Harris
characters.description: Joe HarrisCharacter informationAliasesDynoman(Formerly)Marital statusWidowerAffiliationConstruction shopBiographical informationRelativesMichael Harris(Son)Dylan Harris(Grandson)Bryce Harris(Grandson)Helen Harris(Daughter-in-Law)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'9"Eye colorHazelSeries informationAppearance(s)Dynoman and the VoltPortrayed byRobert Forster Joe Harrisis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. He is a cranky blue-collar worker who, after suffering a knee injury, is forced to move in with his son, daughter-in-law, and two grandsons. Joe makes a surprising connection to his younget grandsonDylanafter they receive a ring that has the power to turn them into superheroes. Joe and his sonMichaelarrive at the latters house. Joe sees his grandson in the garage, and sharply asks what Dylan is wearing. Michael reminds his father that Halloween is this weekend. Michael wants Joe to view this situation as a good thing - a new beginning. He got all the exercise equipment for when the therapist arrived. He begins to quote a mantra to his patients, but Joe grumbles that he's a gastroenterologist.

characters.name: Lee Easton
characters.description: Lee EastonCharacter informationMarital statusSinglePhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'11"Eye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The HeatPortrayed byShane Paul McGhieLee Eastonis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. Tuka attends a sideshow when Lee calls her over. He took the night off to come since she would be there. Sterling walks over to tell them her lie of a late-night practice that happens to be close to the sideshow. They promise to have her back. The trio walks the meet as they watch the cars, though Sterling wants to leave as she has to get to bed. Tuka mocks her for being square, but Sterling snaps that she has to work twice as hard to be seconds slower than her. Sterling storms off, so Tuka follows her. After Tuka's funeral, Sterling lays in her room when Lee visits to check on her. He asks to sit, which she allows. He compliments her perfect service, but she doesn't think any of it is perfect. What happened to Tuka was her fault - she should have just posted there instead of leaving. She made Tuka run after her by ignoring her. Lee puts his arm around her as he comforts her. Being tired is okay. The only person to blame is the person who hit her but then left. Sterling doesn't think it's fair that guy gets away with it. She gave her description to the police though they won't call her back. Lee offers to go to the station to make them listen. She wants to change first, so he leaves. Tuka sits on the chair in the room, listening.

characters.name: Mary Ann Whitaker
characters.description: Mary Ann WhitakerCharacter informationMarital statusWidowedBiographical informationRelativesElijah Whitaker(Stepson)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleEye colorHazelSeries informationAppearance(s)The RiftPortrayed byKerry BishéMary Ann Whitakeris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. She is a young widow whose road trip with her stepson leads to an unexpected encounter with a crashing WWIIpilot. They are soon swept up in his search for home.

characters.name: Michael Harris
characters.description: Michael HarrisCharacter informationMarital statusMarried toHelen HarrisAffiliationGastroenterologistBiographical informationRelativesJoe Harris(Father)Dylan Harris(Son)Bryce Harris(Son)Physical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)Dynoman and the VoltPortrayed byKyle BornheimerMichael Harrisis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. Michael is the only son ofJoe Harrisand his wife. He was primarily raised by his mother, since Joe was often working or doing other passions that took him away from the pair. Michael desired a relationship with his father but gave up on having one when he was young. He went to medical school, though Joe belittled the choice as he views medical soon as "know-it-all boot camp". Michael graduated from medical soon and became a gastroentrerologist. He married psychiatristHelen Harrisand the had two son,BryceandDylan.

characters.name: Nina Bowman
characters.description: Nina BowmanCharacter informationAffiliationDirector of Rift AgencyPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleHeight5'5"Eye colorHazelSeries informationAppearance(s)The RiftPortrayed byJuliana CanfieldNina Bowmanis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories.

characters.name: Paula Porter
characters.description: Paula PorterCharacter informationMarital statusWidowedAffiliationIowa FarmhouseBiographical informationDate of birthCirca. 1800sPlace of birthIowaPlace of deathIowa(Presumed)RelativesEvelyn Porter(Daughter)Emmett Porter(Son: deceased)Little Sam(Grandson)Physical descriptionGenderFemleHeight5'5"Eye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The CellarPortrayed bySasha AlexanderPaula Porteris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. She is the mother ofEvelyn Porter, wanting her daughter to marry as a way to solve their financial hardships. She believes a lady should act a certain way, caring not for her daughter's desires, but for how the world will perceive them.

characters.name: Sam Taylor
characters.description: Samuel TaylorCharacter informationAliasesSamMarital statusUnknownAffiliationTaylor Construction(2019)Sam Taylor Construction(1919)Biographical informationDate of birthCirca. 1990sPlace of birthIowaPlace of deathIowa(Presumed)RelativesJake Taylor(Older Brother)Rodger(Brother-in-Law)Alice Taylor(Niece)Sam(Son)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'10"Eye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The CellarPortrayed byDylan O'BrienSam Tayloris a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories.  While restoring an oldIowa Farmhousein 2019, Sam discovers a time portal in the storm cellar that transports him to 1919, where he meets the stunning socialiteEvelyn Porter. Sam Taylor was born in the 1990s and is the younger brother ofJake Taylor. The duo were close growing up, though Sam was always searching for something. At the age of eight, he was convinced they could find an old Honus Wagner card and become millionaires. His big dream didn't come true, despite looking at fifteen yard sales. The pair remained close with Sam becoming a doting uncle to his adoptive niece Alice. The brothers opened Taylor Construction where they rebuilt old homes for wealthy clients. The Taylor brothers arrive at an oldIowa Farmhousethey are being paid to restore to its original glory. Upon entering,Jakeis optimistic about the space's potential, while Sam is skeptical. He swipes through a dating app as he walks through the house with Jake. The brothers discover the house doesn't have power, deciding to check the breaker in the cellar. While Sam swipes on his phone, Jake discovers a barometer on the wall. He notes that it probably came out in the turn of the century. As Jake taps on it, Sam matches with a girl who wants to make plans for that night.

characters.name: Sara
characters.description: SaraCharacter informationMarital statusSingleAffiliationOther worldBiographical informationDate of death2020Place of deathDiner parking lotPhysical descriptionSpeciesAlienGenderFemaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)Signs of LifePortrayed byMichelle WilliamsSarais a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. During an electrical outage caused by a mysterious storm, comatose patientSara Jordansuddenly awakens. The woman's daughter,Alia, struggles to learn the woman before her who has no memory of her life. Meanwhile, "Sara" begins a mysterious operation with a stranger to rescue another woman from a government prison so they can return to their world. Not much is known about Sara or where she comes from. She hail from another world and atmosphere where she has a high ranking to ensure that her comrades return to their home without a trace of their arrival being left behind. In the coma ward of a hospital, alarms blare as a storm rages on outside. The nurses rush to the ward to find one of the patients,Sara Jordan, awake by slightly incoherent. They help her to the bed and then call Dr. Koh, who explains to Sara that she's been in a coma for six-years and is now being transported to another wing. Alia rushes to the hospital to see her mom with Dr. Koh. Alia greets her mom happily but Sara doesn't recognize her. Dr. Koh assures Alia that this is normal, and the fact that Sara's even speaking is miraculous. Sara is taken to an MRI. Dr. Coh compares scans that show Sara's brain has managed to repair some of its damaged parts. The brain sometimes can rewire itself, but it can be months before it recovers. Sara wants to make a call. Alia puts the number in her phone and calls, though the person hangs up. Sara is unresponsive to her communicative attempts, even jerking her hand away from Alia.

characters.name: Sara Jordan
characters.description: Sara JordanCharacter informationMarital statusSingleBiographical informationRelativesAlia Jordan(Daughter)Physical descriptionSpeciesHuman(Currently)Otherwordly Being(While Possessed; formerly)GenderFemaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)Signs of LifePortrayed byMichelle WilsonSara Jordanis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. After awakening from a six-coma, Sara struggles to remember her life and adapt to the world around her.

characters.name: Sterling Johnson
characters.description: Sterling JohnsonCharacter informationAliasesSter(ByTuka)Marital statusDatingTuka Myrtle HallAffiliationTrack StarBiographical informationDate of birth2002RelativesUnnamed GrandmotherPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The HeatPortrayed byE'myri CrutchfieldSterling Johnsonis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. She is an aspiring track star whose close friendship withTuka Myrtle Hallblossoms into something more in the wake of an amazing incident. Sterling was born in 2002, presumably in Oakland. She metTuka Myrtle Hallwhen the girls were young and they had an instant bond. Tuka purused her passion for running, becoming a track star. She brought Sterling with her, though it was obvious to everyone that Tuka was the true star. Sterling was raised by her grandmother in their small house. She also befriendedLee Eastonand dreamt of a vision of life with Tuka beyond high school. Tukaand Sterling run down the streets together as they dodge a car, jump over a spurting fire hydrant, and race the red light. They barely avoid colliding with some vehicles. They run into a building and up the steps to the roof. They compliment each other's running before looking over the edge to watch the runners. Tuka is excited for the Stokes-Pickett Invitational as they'll be running on the track, as opposed to the concrete at their school. Sterling states that 20 recruiters are coming out. She has to cut her time enough to get the scholarship. She wants to talk about the future, but Tuka thinks it will handle itself.

characters.name: Theodore Cole
characters.description: Theodore ColeCharacter informationAliasesTeddy(by Pauline)Marital statusMarried to Pauline(At time of death)AffiliationLieutenant for US MilitarySecond SquadronFirst American Volunteer GroupPilotBiographical informationPlace of birthDayton, Ohio, USADate of deathDecember 24th, 1941Place of deathMyanmar (Burma), AsiaRelativesUnnamed ParentsPhysical descriptionGenderMaleHeight6'1"Eye colorBlueSeries informationAppearance(s)The RiftPortrayed byAustin StowellLieutenant Theodore Coleis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. Theodore Cole was born and raised in Dayton, Ohio. In high school, he was a baseball pitcher and led the team to three consecutive championships. While he earned a scholarship to college, he chose to join the military instead. He met his future wife Pauline while working as a bag boy at the local market. They were married shortly before his deployment to the South Pacific. He had a superstition of never saying goodbye, as he believed that if it wasn't said then it would never truly be goodbye. He carried a photograph of Pauline with him in his plane, where he was a pilot. On Christmas Eve 1941, he took flight over mountainous terrain in Burman to locate a missing aircraft. After encountering resistance, his plane did not return to base. He was declared Missing in Action and presumed deceased.

They were married shortly before his deployment to the South Pacific. He had a superstition of never saying goodbye, as he believed that if it wasn't said then it would never truly be goodbye. He carried a photograph of Pauline with him in his plane, where he was a pilot. On Christmas Eve 1941, he took flight over mountainous terrain in Burman to locate a missing aircraft. After encountering resistance, his plane did not return to base. He was declared Missing in Action and presumed deceased.

characters.name: Tuka Myrtle Hall
characters.description: Tuka Myrtle HallCharacter informationAliasesTukaAffiliationTrack StarBiographical informationDate of birth2002Place of birthOaklandRelativesNoah Terry(Cousin)Hazel(Great-Aunt)Physical descriptionGenderFemaleEye colorBrownSeries informationAppearance(s)The HeatPortrayed byHailey KilgorePetrushka "Tuka" Myrtle Hallis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. She is an elite runner whose close bond with her best friendSterling Johnsontransforms the physical world, taking Tuka on an adventure of discovery. Tuka was born in 2002 in Oakland. She metSterling Johnsonwhen the girls were young and they had an instant bond. Tuka purused her passion for running, becoming a track star. She brought Sterling with her, though it was obvious to everyone that Tuka was the true star. She held the fastest time in the women's 400-meter for two straight seasons. Tuka and Sterling run down the streets together as they dodge a car, jump over a spurting fire hydrant, and race the red light. They barely avoid colliding with some vehicles. They run into a building and up the steps to the roof. They compliment each other's running before looking over the edge to watch the runners. Tuka is excited for the Stokes-Pickett Invitational as they'll be running on the track, as opposed to the concrete at their school. Sterling states that 20 recruiters are coming out. She has to cut her time enough to get the scholarship. She wants to talk about the future, but Tuka thinks it will handle itself.

characters.name: Wayne Wilkes
characters.description: Wayne WilkesCharacter informationMarital statusMarried to Mrs. WilkesSingle(Being)AffiliationOther worldBiographical informationDate of death2020Place of deathSatellite fieldPhysical descriptionSpeciesHuman(Wayne)Alien(Being)GenderMaleHeight6'2"Eye colorHazelSeries informationAppearance(s)Signs of LifePortrayed byJosh HollowayWayne Wilkesis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. Wayne Wilkes was born and raised in Anniston Alabama. He was prom king in high school with his girlfriend, who later became his wife. He worked a blue collar job all his life, loved his wife, and was happy despite their financial shortcomings. He had an accident at work when he fell off a ladder, splitting his skull open. He was in a coma for six months, though his wife visited him every single day. Not much is known about the being that posssessed Wayne. He came from another world and accidentally arrived during a brutual storm.

characters.name: William
characters.description: WilliamCharacter informationMarital statusEngaged toEvelyn Porter(1919)Biographical informationDate of birthCirca. 1800sPlace of birthIowaRelativesMildred(Daughter)Unnamed(Daughter)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHeight5'11"Eye colorHazelSeries informationAppearance(s)The CellarPortrayed byGabriel OldsWilliamis a character in the Apple TV+ series,Amazing Stories. He is the betrothed fiance ofEvelyn Porter, having been promised her hand in marriage in exchange for giving financial stablitily to Evelyn and hermother. William was previously married and they had two daughters together. His wife died of influenza in 1918, leaving William a widower and single father. He sought to bring in another woman to help care for his daughters, and was promised the hand ofEvelyn Porterin an arranged marriage orchestrated byPaula Porter.
